chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No. D-686 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A No.2774/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.11.2025 Mr. Farhan Ahmed Bozdar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G. = Mr. Anand Kumar Khatri advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record. SHO P.S Khipro submitted comments alongwith copy of F.I.R bearing Crime No.236/ 2025 under section 489-F PPC lodged by respondent Zia-ul-Haque, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that F.I.R has been lodged by respondent Zia-ul-Haque bearing Crime No.236/ 2025 at PS Khipro for offence under section 489-F P.P.C. He also filed statement in this regard, which is taken on record. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application has become infructuous; hence same alongwith listed application is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE “Saleem”
